guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 41. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_ai: Point to the big AI and say: aiaiai. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_ea: Now point to the big EA and say: eaeaea.

parent_story: A train rode in the rain. A yellow leaf fell on the train window.
